title: cordia collococca
intro: Cordia collococca, also known as Ixora coccinea, is a tropical flowering plant native to the Americas, belonging to the Rubiaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits associated with Cordia collococca include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from gastrointestinal problems. Herbal preparations of Cordia collococca may include decoctions, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
